arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the ElastiCache cluster.

availability_zone.description: The availability zone where the ElastiCache cluster is located.

cache_nodes.description: Details of the cache nodes in the ElastiCache cluster, including address, availability zone, ID, outpost ARN, and port.

cluster_address.description: The address of the cache cluster.

configuration_endpoint.description: The configuration endpoint for the ElastiCache cluster.

engine.description: The name of the cache engine used by the ElastiCache cluster.

engine_version.description: The version of the cache engine used by the ElastiCache cluster.

id.description: The ID of the ElastiCache cluster.

ip_discovery.description: The method used for IP discovery in the ElastiCache cluster.

log_delivery_configuration.description: The configuration for log delivery of the ElastiCache cluster, including destination, type, format, and log type.

maintenance_window.description: The time window during which maintenance updates can be applied to the ElastiCache cluster.

network_type.description: The type of network used by the ElastiCache cluster.

node_type.description: The type of node used in the ElastiCache cluster.

notification_topic_arn.description: The ARN of the notification topic for the ElastiCache cluster.

num_cache_nodes.description: The number of cache nodes in the ElastiCache cluster.

parameter_group_name.description: The name of the parameter group used by the ElastiCache cluster.

port.description: The port number on which the ElastiCache cluster accepts connections.

preferred_outpost_arn.description: The ARN of the preferred outpost for the ElastiCache cluster.

replication_group_id.description: The ID of the replication group to which the ElastiCache cluster belongs.

security_group_ids.description: The IDs of the security groups associated with the ElastiCache cluster.

snapshot_retention_limit.description: The number of days for which snapshots are retained for the ElastiCache cluster.

snapshot_window.description: The time window during which snapshots are taken for the ElastiCache cluster.

subnet_group_name.description: The name of the subnet group associated with the ElastiCache cluster.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the ElastiCache cluster.
